basic_details.job_title: DCHS Vizianagaram Civil Assistant Surgeon Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Vizianagaram)
basic_details.post_name: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists / Civil Assistant Surgeon (General)
basic_details.short_information: District Coordinator of Hospital Services (DCHS Vizianagaram) Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists / Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) Notification 2026 has been released under Advt. No. 01/2026. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the DCHS Vizianagaram Recruitment 2026 for various Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist and Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) posts.

age_limit.age_details: OC: 42 years, EWS/SC/ST/BC: 47 years, Differently abled: 52 years as on 01.07.2026. Ex-servicemen get 3 years relaxation.
age_limit.details: OC candidates: Maximum age limit is 42 years as on 01.07.2026. EWS/SC/ST/BC candidates: Maximum age limit is 47 years as on 01.07.2026. Differently abled persons: Maximum age limit is 52 years as on 01.07.2026. Ex-servicemen get 3 years relaxation in age.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree/DNB/Diploma in the particular specialty or MBBS with AP Medical Council registration.
qualification.details: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist: Must have passed PG Degree / DNB / Diploma in the particular specialty or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity. Civil Assistant Surgeon (General): Must have passed MBBS or its equivalent qualification included in the schedule - I & II of the MCI Act, 1956. Registered in A.P. Medical Council with current validity.

salary_details.pay_scale: Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist: Rs.1,10,000/-, Civil Assistant Surgeon General: Rs.61,960/-

selection_process: Selection will be based on merit and rule of reservation Merit list will be prepared for all the candidates who applied and fulfilled all the eligibility conditions. Selection lists will be prepared based on merit lists and Rule of Reservation issued in AP State and Subordinate Services.

all_official_links.label: Download DCHS Vizianagaram Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DCHS Vizianagaram?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for DCHS Vizianagaram is scheduled for 17 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by DCHS Vizianagaram?
faq.answer: DCHS Vizianagaram has announced a total of 11 vacancies for the posts of Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialists and Civil Assistant Surgeon (General).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) post?
faq.answer: For the Civil Assistant Surgeon (General) post, candidates must have passed MBBS or its equivalent qualification and be registered with the A.P. Medical Council.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for a Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist?
faq.answer: The salary offered for a Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist is Rs. 1,10,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for OC candidates applying for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for OC candidates is 42 years as of 01.07.2026. Age relaxations are applicable for other categories.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the DCHS Vizianagaram recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Interested candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue with all original and photocopied documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit and the rule of reservation. A merit list will be prepared for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be carried for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original certificates, a set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Which specialties are covered under the Civil Assistant Surgeon Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The vacancies include specialties such as Pathology, ENT, Radiology, General Surgery, and Ophthalmology.
